untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Relative strength rank' (proprietary ranking metric), 'EPS growth rate YoY' (fundamental data not in price/technical indicators), 'Price move constraint (15% in 5 days)', and 'EPS guidance reduction' — none of these are available in the allowed indicator set. RSI_14 used as proxy for relative strength momentum, but this is an imperfect substitution.
translation_notes: Mapped 'Relative strength rank > 90' to rsi_14 > 90 as closest technical proxy for strong momentum screening. Volume condition uses vol_ratio_20 to capture volume above 20-day average. EPS growth and guidance conditions cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Price advance constraint (max 15% in 5 days) and EPS guidance reduction exit require fundamental data unavailable in the indicator set.
